image_resolution.source: RoboTwin DP trains on raw camera resolution (no explicit resize); images stay HWC->CHW /255 in deploy_policy.encode_obs

max_episode_steps.source: RoboTwin 2.0 default step_lim for Easy tasks (matches DPRunner.max_steps)

camera.value: RoboTwin 3-camera: head_camera + left_camera + right_camera (also referenced as head_cam/left_cam/right_cam in obs dict)

control_mode.source: RoboTwin ALOHA bimanual joint-pos control; DP predicts qpos targets (14D)

obs_mode.source: RoboTwin default; DP shape_meta declares rgb image obs

prompt_format.source: Diffusion Policy is non-language-conditioned (UNet on stacked image+state)

image_flip_180deg.source: RoboTwin upright cameras; no flip needed

resize_method.source: deploy_policy.encode_obs does no resize; obs encoder uses random_crop=True at training time

image_resize_before_model.source: DP receives raw H x W images; obs encoder handles internal preprocessing

center_crop.source: DP training uses random_crop (group norm + imagenet_norm); inference passes through

unnorm_key.source: DP uses LinearNormalizer fit at training time, stored inside the ckpt; no external key

state_dim.source: RoboTwin sends 14D bimanual qpos; DP shape_meta agent_pos.shape=[14] in robot_dp_14.yaml

action_dim.source: RoboTwin take_action accepts 14D; DP action.shape=[14] in robot_dp_14.yaml

required_obs_keys.source: policy_server.py _convert_obs maps these client keys to upstream {head_cam,left_cam,right_cam,agent_pos}

obs_wrapper.source: RoboTwin run_eval_ws.py emits flat dict on the wire

train_seed_range.value: 100,200,300,400,500 (training seed labels per dir; not RoboTwin scene seeds)
train_seed_range.source: Avada11/RoboTwin-Model-AgileX-DP subdirs <task>-demo_clean-100/{100..500}/<epoch>.ckpt — model training seeds, orthogonal to RoboTwin eval seeds (100000+)
